_comment: Layout manifest — the SINGLE source of truth for layouts. The server (api.py) derives its HTML/JS/CSS routes from this, and the chooser builds its cards from this (injected inline, or fetched at /layouts.json when served raw). Add a layout here and it surfaces in BOTH the chooser and the routes. kind: function-mapped | generic | placeholder.

layouts.name: Bring your own
layouts.description: Build a layout for your own toy — and share it.
